mapper.select: select * from users where id = #{id} and deleted = false
select * from users where username = #{username} and deleted = false
select * from users where student_no = #{studentNo} and deleted = false
select * from users where deleted = false order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into users(username, password, full_name, student_no, phone, role, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{username}, #{password}, #{fullName}, #{studentNo}, #{phone}, #{role}, #{enabled}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: update users set password = #{password}, full_name = #{fullName}, student_no = #{studentNo}, phone = #{phone}, role = #{role}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
